Upayas for malefic or weak Mars:
1. Give al'ticleS related to Mars on Tuesday.
2. Petformjapa of Mar'S mantra 108 times.
3. Wear Mars y~ntra in the neck.
4. Keep Tuesday fast.
5. If Mars is in Leo or Sagittarius Rasl(malnly in its Oasa) then
perform pvja of Lord Kart/kaye, If It is in 3'd, 6t"' or 12th house
then do wja of Goddess Chamuncta. To get rid of l~ns do
path of Sunder Kaand.
6. Read Sunder Kaand. Hanuman Challsa or 8ajrang 8aan. do
p~h of Laxmi stotra. Devi kavach and Ganpati Stotra.
7. Keep 21 Sankpati fasts ar.d 21 vinayake fasts.
8. Drink water in copper or bronze vessel.
9. Eat red masoor dal. Tulsi leaf, black pepper and gur on
Tuesday.
10. Do not give food to a crippled (handicapped) person.
11. Do not wear red colour shoes or clothes.
12. Float red flOwers in river.
13. Do not apply kesattilakor sindOor on TueSday.
14. Give sindoor for 27 Tuesdays in a hoty place.
